## Problem

Describe the problem this change addresses.

## Approach

Explain the implementation and any architecture or compatibility impact.

## Verification

List exact commands and relevant manual checks performed.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests cover observable behavior.
- [ ] `./gradlew check` passes locally.
- [ ] Public API or architecture changes include documentation.
- [ ] No credentials, generated build output, or unrelated changes are included.
